title: Sanji and Zeff’s Starvation Flashback
description: On pages 5–8, Sanji’s past with Zeff is revealed through their starvation on a rock, explaining the debt that binds him to the Baratie.
scene: The flashback strips away the noise of battle and focuses on hunger, sacrifice, and the dream of creating a restaurant where no one is denied food.

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Don't I always say not to ever lay even a finger,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes, sir...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: On our enemies' food...?

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Damn Idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhh! What's with this kid!

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Hey kid. You shouldn't be swinging around those things. It's dangerous.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Look, I'm bleeding. I might be seriously wounded.

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Shut up! Like I'm just going to stand still and let you kill me!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sanji, no! Don't fight back!

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Stop it, kid! Don't provoke them any further!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Do something about him! He's one of your cooks, isn't he!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Sanji! Stop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If the kid wants to die so badly,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then kill him already and be done with it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's not like I want to die! But you pirates are gonna kill us all anyways!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So I'll kill you first before you can kill me!

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Damn, look at the captain go.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: He never holds back, does he...!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm gonna...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Find all blue one day...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahaha haha!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: He said he's gonna find all blue! That's quite the dream!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: go ahead, captain! Tell him! Tell him that a place like that,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Doesn't exist even in Grand Line!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: you idiot...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why would you go and talk about that now of all times...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's no way,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That I'm gonna be killed by stupid pirates like you in a place like this!

summary: This part gives emotional meaning to Sanji’s choices: Zeff’s sacrifice explains why feeding the hungry is sacred to him.
